brand.name: Tablesmit
brand.description: A minimalist table builder for analytical writing — with full control over headers, formatting, and export.
brand.aboutLine: Tablesmit was created by a writer who needed more control than basic table generators provided. Built for people who think in structure and publish with precision.
brand.whatItIsNot: Not a spreadsheet. Not a database. Not a Notion competitor. Not a design-heavy tool. We are a structured writing tool.
brand.openSourceDescription: Tablesmit is free and open source. The code is on GitHub — read it, fork it, improve it, or adapt it for your own needs. We believe tools for writing and thinking should be transparent.

hero.headline: Tables built for analytical writing.
hero.subtext: A minimalist table builder for analytical writing — with full control over headers, formatting, and export.

about.heading: Built for structured thinkers.
about.body: Tablesmit was created by a writer who needed more control than basic table generators provided. Most tools gave too little — no header customization, no column formatting, no clean export. Others gave too much — the full weight of a spreadsheet for something that just needed to be a table. Tablesmit is the middle ground. Built for people who think in structure and publish with precision.
about.whatWeAreNot: Not a spreadsheet. Not a database. Not a Notion competitor. Not a design-heavy tool. We are a structured writing tool.

openSource.heading: Built in the open.
openSource.body: Tablesmit is free and open source. The code is on GitHub — read it, fork it, improve it, or adapt it for your own needs. We believe tools for writing and thinking should be transparent.
openSource.contributorsBody: Tablesmit exists because of open source contributors. Every bug report, pull request, and suggestion matters.
openSource.contributeBody: Read CONTRIBUTION.md in the repository for guidelines on reporting bugs, suggesting features, and submitting pull requests.
openSource.footerNote: MIT licensed. No warranties. Built with care.

contact.heading: Get in touch.
contact.body: Have a question, suggestion, or feedback? We would love to hear from you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your question or idea...
contact.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorBody: Could not send your message. Try again or email us directly.
contact.featureIdeaDesc: Something missing that would make your workflow cleaner? Tell me.
contact.bugGlitchDesc: Something not working right? I will take a look and fix it.
contact.somethingElseDesc: Anything on your mind. I read every message.
contact.builtWithCare: Built with care, maintained with gratitude.

themes.defaultDescription: White cells, primary blue header, standard border
themes.darkHeaderDescription: Deep navy header, white text, light grey rows
themes.academicDescription: Grey header, double top border, no inner vertical borders

meta.homeDescription: Build clean, structured tables with full control over headers, formatting, and export. Free table maker, no signup required. Export to PDF, Excel, CSV, or PNG.
meta.aboutDescription: Learn about Tablesmit, the minimalist table builder for analytical writing. Built for writers, analysts, and researchers who need clean structured tables.
meta.blogDescription: Writing about tables, structure, and analytical thinking. Guides on Markdown tables, CSV import, Excel copy-paste, and more.
meta.contactDescription: Get in touch with the Tablesmit team. Feature requests, bug reports, and feedback are always welcome.
meta.openSourceDescription: Tablesmit is free and open source under the MIT license. Read the code, fork it, improve it, or adapt it for your own needs.
meta.changelogDescription: Every release of Tablesmit, documented. See what is new, fixed, and improved in each version.
meta.testimonialsDescription: Hear from writers, analysts, researchers, and technical thinkers who use Tablesmit every day.
meta.featuresDescription: Every feature you need to build clean, structured tables. Drag-to-resize, merge cells, custom headers, export to PDF and Excel.
meta.notFoundDescription: Page not found. Let us get you back to building tables.
meta.privacyDescription: Tablesmit Privacy Policy. We do not require an account and we do not store your table data on any server.
meta.termsDescription: Tablesmit Terms of Use. By using Tablesmit you agree to these terms.

features.heading: Features
features.subtext: Every feature you need to build clean, structured tables.

cookieConsent.message: This site uses cookies for analytics. No personal data is collected.
cookieConsent.learnMoreAria: Learn more about our privacy policy

errors.pageNotFoundSub: That URL doesn't exist. Let's get you back to building.

privacy.intro: {{name}} is a browser-based tool. We do not require an account, and we do not store your table data on any server.
privacy.whatWeCollectBody: We may use analytics to understand how people use {{name}}. Analytics collect anonymised usage data such as pages visited, time on page, and general geographic region at country level. We do not collect names, email addresses, or personally identifiable information through the app itself.
privacy.whatWeDontCollectBody: Your table content never leaves your browser. We do not transmit, store, or process your table data on our servers. We do not sell data to third parties.
privacy.fileImportsBody: When you import a CSV or Excel file, it is read locally in your browser. The file is never uploaded to any server.

terms.intro: By using {{name}} you agree to these terms.
terms.serviceBody: {{name}} is provided free of charge, as-is, with no guarantees of uptime, accuracy, or fitness for any particular purpose.
terms.yourContentBody: You retain full ownership of any content you create with {{name}}. We claim no rights over your tables, data, or exports.
terms.openSourceBody: {{name}} source code is available under the MIT license. You may fork, modify, and distribute it under those terms.
